chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-3288 of 2022 CP No.D-3289 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of Misc. No14590/2022 2. For hearing of main case 21.08.2025 Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG --------- These are old petitions of 2022, which are over 03 years old. On the last date of hearing i.e. 16.01.2023, more than two and half years ago, none was present for the petitioners without intimation. In the last two and half years, learned counsel for the petitioners has made no efforts to pursue these petitions. Once-again, today, learned counsel for the petitioners is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing these old petitions, which are accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith pending application(s), if any. Office to place a copy of this order in connected petition. Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
